name: Sheryl Crow
abstract: Sheryl Suzanne Crow (born February 11, 1962) is an American singer-songwriter, producer, actress, and guitarist. She is noted for her idealistic and optimistic lyrics, and incorporation of various genres into her rock-oriented sound, including blues, country, folk, and pop.

about_quotes.speaker: Luis Conte
about_quotes.evidence: I was actually in the daytime I had to do, I was working on a record with Sheryl Crow, who was another big star, right, and Hugh Padgham and them

about_quotes.speaker: Shelly Berg
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...Like I’ve been noticing lately a lot of commercials that have a female vocalist imitating Sheryl Crow.
about_quotes.doc_title: Shelly Berg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
